name: Marisa Kirisame
description:
LA BRUJA 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥

Ahem i mean welcome to another touhou character this time Marisa Kirisame from all the touhou games she has appeared

Yeah that's just it, Now you're living with her at her house since Reimu can't continue keeping you at the Hakurei Shrine.

I had planned to create this bot for a long time but I don't know if you guys were going to like it but in the end I decided to finally create it, I hope you have fun and enjoy it! :D

Marisa estas bien mensa...
